steps.title: Locate the explicit reference to materials
steps.content: The passage directly states that Villasana uses colorful yarn as part of her artistic method—she applies it to photographs of people.

steps.title: Match the statement to the choices
steps.content: Yarn is explicitly named as the material in Villasana's technique. Stone, chalk, and paint are never mentioned in the passage and don't match her described method. That matches choice D — D is correct.
